headline: Trump posts AI-generated alien arrest image on Truth Social
summary: Donald Trump shared an AI-generated image on Truth Social depicting him walking alongside a handcuffed alien surrounded by security personnel, following the release of the so-called PURSUE files. Critics said the post reflected a pattern of sharing unverified or fabricated content without context or factual grounding.

tweets.text: Donald Trump shares an AI image on his 'Truth Social' of him walking alongside a handcuffed alien surrounded by security personnel following the release of the PURSUE files. https://t.co/GGBxjZttxx

@NewsWire_US Trump sharing an AI alien photo tells you everything about his attention span. He knows his base will share anything weird without fact checking first. This is not governance or even satire anymore. It is just a bored old man posting nonsense to feel relevant while real problems
